prestazioni: G-Power SK III Supercharger Kit (S85B50 engine) with custom pulley upgrade to 10.5 psi, paired with a G-Power high-flow fuel system (dual Bosch 044 pumps, upgraded injectors to Siemens DEKA 870cc/min), and a G-Power ECU flash optimized for 700+ HP on 98 RON fuel with a 93-octane fallback map

BMS S85 V10 ported and polished cylinder heads with oversized titanium intake valves (Ferrea F1500P), upgraded valve springs (Ferrea F2140), and a custom Schrick 284°/280° camshaft profile for high-RPM power retention (8,500 RPM redline)

Full titanium exhaust system by Eisenmann (4.5" diameter, quad 100mm outlets) with a straight-pipe design, bypassing the factory cats and resonators, paired with a custom X-Pipe by Supersprint for optimized scavenging and a deep, aggressive V10 tone
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (E60-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler, all painted in BMW Individual Frozen Gray II (A96) with matte black accents

OEM+ M6 GT3-style carbon fiber front bumper with integrated LED daytime running lights (Lux H8 V4) and a custom carbon fiber hood (G-Power Hurricane RS) featuring a functional central vent for improved engine bay cooling

BC Racing BR Coilovers (E60-specific) with Swift Springs (8K front, 10K rear) and custom camber plates for aggressive stance, paired with OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5" (ET22) and 19x11" (ET45) wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)
